name: tmuxcasebot
description: TmuxCaseBot — Telegram Mini App (Backend + Frontend + Admin + Battle Bot)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix battle-bot && npm install
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix admin
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN,BATTLE" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix admin" "npm start --prefix battle-bot"
